_readme: Copy the 'sentinel' block into your Claude Code MCP config file.
_instructions: 1. Start Sentinel first: run start.bat (or: uvicorn api.main:app --port 8000)
2. Add the 'sentinel' entry below into your MCP client's mcpServers config
3. Update the 'cwd' path to match where sentinel is installed on your machine
4. Restart Claude Code / Claude Desktop after editing the config
5. The 'review_action' tool will now be available in your agent sessions

sentinel._note: Change 'cwd' to the absolute path of your sentinel project root

review_action.description: Review a proposed agent action BEFORE executing it. Returns ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW.

args.action_text: The exact command or action the agent wants to run (required)
args.user_task: The user's original high-level task/goal, for scope-creep detection (optional)

get_recent_decisions.description: Return the most recent Sentinel review decisions from the audit log.

args.limit: Number of recent decisions to return (default: 20)

_alternative_http_mode._note: If you prefer HTTP over stdio, you can also call the FastAPI directly
_alternative_http_mode.example_curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/review -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"action_text": "rm -rf /", "user_task": "clean up files"}'
